history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a cartoonish figure with a red cap and blue shirt, with bold text overlaid across the lower portion of the frame.

The main subject is a partially visible, stylized character from the chest up, wearing a blue top with a red collar and red trim, and a red cap or hat featuring a puffed red shape in the center. The face has a dark beard and mustache, and the character is shown facing forward with a neutral or focused look, though the exact expression is somewhat obscured by the stylized style and cropping.

The setting appears to be indoors or in front of a plain, light-colored background; the lighting is warm and even. The camera angle is close and slightly low-to-level, tightly framing the head and upper torso.

Color and composition include prominent blue clothing contrasted with red hat and accents. The overlaid text is white with a black outline, placed near the bottom of the image in two lines.

Visible Text:
ITU MASALAH KAMU BUKAN MASALAH SAYA

Practical Summary:
The image displays a stylized character with a red-and-blue outfit against a simple light background. Large overlaid text in Indonesian sits across the bottom, reading “ITU MASALAH KAMU BUKAN MASALAH SAYA.”

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
